scripts.eval: mkdir -p .home && HOME=$PWD/.home sh -c 'for f in */promptfooconfig.yaml; do promptfoo eval -c "$f" || exit 1; done'
scripts.eval:deterministic: mkdir -p .home && HOME=$PWD/.home promptfoo eval -c nota-de-triagem/promptfooconfig.yaml && HOME=$PWD/.home promptfoo eval -c triagem-de-pods/promptfooconfig.yaml && HOME=$PWD/.home promptfoo eval -c networkpolicy-sentinel/promptfooconfig.yaml
